test_name: Verify User Can Login Via Google
description: This test verifies that a user is able to successfully log in using Google authentication on the RoostGPT testing platform.
steps: Navigate to the login page at 'https://dev.roost.ai/login'.
Locate the Google login button using the stable selector.
Verify that the Google authentication page is displayed.
Verify that the user is redirected to the main dashboard at 'https://dev.roost.ai/roostgpt/tests'.
Check that the user's profile information is displayed correctly on the dashboard.
Log out to complete the session.
expected_results: User is redirected to the Google authentication page.
Successful login redirects the user to 'https://dev.roost.ai/roostgpt/tests'.
User's profile information is displayed on the dashboard.
edge_cases: Google account does not have a valid email.
Click on the Google login button multiple times rapidly.
User cancels the Google authentication process.
data_requirements: Access to the Google authentication server.
RoostGPT user account associated with the Google account.
performance_metrics: Time taken to redirect to the dashboard after successful login.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure login button is accessible via keyboard navigation.
Verify that the login process is screen-reader friendly.
